activation.title: Enter Activation Code
activation.description: Enter your activation code to unlock a course or learning program.
activation.successMessage: Your code has been successfully redeemed. New content has been unlocked.
activation.errorRedeeming: There was an error redeeming the code. Please try again later.
activation.loginRequired: Please log in to redeem an activation code.

authRequired.title: Login required
authRequired.description: Learning content is only available after login. Please sign in to continue.

roleplay.title: Conversation Practice
roleplay.description: Practice your conversational skills with AI in guided scenarios.
roleplay.emptyDescription: Start a new conversation to practice your skills.
roleplay.noScenarios: No published roleplay scenarios are available for your courses yet.
roleplay.dialogDescription: Select a predefined scenario or create your own:
roleplay.customScenarioPlaceholder: e.g. You are a police officer taking my statement about a minor car accident...
roleplay.confirmComplete: Are you sure you want to end the conversation and get feedback?

scenarios.hotel: You are a hotel receptionist checking me in. I lost my booking reference.
scenarios.interview: You are a recruiter interviewing me for a Software Engineer position.
scenarios.coffee: You are a barista at a busy coffee shop. I am ordering a complicated drink.
scenarios.friends: We are old friends catching up after 5 years at a cafe.

profile.title: Student Profile
profile.loginPrompt: Please log in to view your profile and learning statistics.
profile.noActivity: No recent activity found. Start learning to see your progress here!

empty.title: No notifications yet
empty.description: When new events occur, notifications will appear here.

dailyQuest.title: Daily quest
dailyQuest.description: Your practice set is prepared from your weakest skills. Complete it to maintain your learning streak.
dailyQuest.generateError: Could not create the daily quest.

hero.title: Master
hero.desc: Comprehensive online learning platform with HSK 1-6 roadmaps. AI pronunciation practice, smart Flashcards, and high-quality video lectures.

skillMastery.subtitle: Sorted from your weakest skills to your strongest.

features.whyUsDesc: Modern learning methods combined with AI technology help you remember vocabulary 300% longer than traditional methods.

hsk.title: Standard HSK Roadmap
hsk.desc: Lessons are designed closely following the latest HSK curricula from HSK 1 to HSK 6.

library.title: Massive Library
library.desc: Over 5000 video lectures, 10,000 flashcards, and a rich repository of practice exams.

community.title: Vibrant Community
community.desc: Connect with thousands of other students and compete in weekly rankings.

lesson.title: Lesson
lesson.sampleDesc: In this lesson, we will take the first steps on the journey to master Chinese. You will learn how to pronounce basic initials and finals, and how to greet others politely.
goalItems: Know how to greet people socially
lesson.videoUnsupported: Your browser does not support the video tag.
lesson.notFoundDesc: The lesson you are looking for does not exist or has been removed.
lesson.loadError: Cannot load this lesson right now.
lesson.simulationGreeting: Hello! I am your AI roleplay assistant for this lesson. Are you ready to begin?
lesson.simulationReply: Good response. I am reviewing it against the roleplay scenario.

discussion.title: Discussion
discussion.subtitle: Ask questions and continue the conversation with classmates and instructors.
